title: Simplest Excavators
description: Tiered excavators capable of mining in a 3x3 area
body:
# About

**Tired of endless terraforming in Minecraft? Use an excavator!**

This mod adds excavators that function like shovels but in a 3x3 area which greatly simplifies terraforming and digging in the middle and late stages of the game.

# How It Works 

To obtain an excavator, you must first find a new smithing template to upgrade your shovel. It can be found in villages: most often in the weaponsmiths, toolsmiths, and armorers houses, less often in regular houses. 

Using a smithing template and a block of appropriate material on a smithing table, you can upgrade your shovel to a brand new excavator.

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a268127cf12bd23323302f7edae92e874f67b48.png)

# FAQ

**Q:** Will you port Simplest Excavators to Fabric?\
**A:** No, we usually only use Neoforge

**Q:** Will you back-port Simplest Excavators to X version?\
**A:** No, we don't usually back-port
